title: Javier Enrique Aguilar
text:
I am a doctoral researcher at the Cluster of Excellence SimTech at the University of Stuttgart and a research assistant at TU Dortmund, working with Paul Bürkner. I hold a Master’s degree in Probability and Statistics from the Center for Research in Mathematics CIMAT in Guanajuato, Mexico, where I was supervised by Andrés Christen.
My research interests focus on Bayesian Inference, Bayesian Computation, Prior Specification, Probabilistic Programming, and High-Dimensional Statistics.
Feel free to reach out if you’re interested in collaborating or have any questions or comments about my work.

title: Presentations
text:
Upcoming presentations:

International Conference on Multilevel Analysis, Utrecht, Netherlands. Contributed Talk: Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models.
ISBA World Meeting 2024. Venice, Italy. Poster: Generalized Decomposition priors on R2.

I have presented at the following events:

NordStat 2023. Gothenburg, Sweden. Contributed Talk: Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models.
BayesComp 2023. Levi, Finland. Poster: Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models.
German Probability and Statistics Days (GPSD). Essen, Germany. Contributed Talk: Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models.
International Conference on Statistics and Data Science (ICSDS) 2022, Florence, Italy 2022. Invited Talk: Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models. Student travel award given by the IMS.
